extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and toolbar

extDescription.message: Capture videos from any webpage into your Lazynext timeline.
extDescription.description: Short description shown in Chrome Web Store

extActionTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the extension icon

captureStatus.message: Capture video from current page and import into your Lazynext timeline.

drmProtected.message: Could not capture — video may be DRM-protected.
drmProtected.description: Error shown when video capture fails due to DRM

accessFailed.message: Failed to access page. Try refreshing.
accessFailed.description: Error shown when page access fails

noVideos.message: No videos detected on this page.
noVideos.description: Message when no video elements found

tryAgain.message: Navigate to a page with video content and try again.

videosDetected.description: Shows number of videos detected. $1$ = number, $2$ = 's' or empty

aiIngest.message: Send to Lazynext AI Agent for analysis

selectArea.message: Drag to select an area to capture
